name: Un web de gentil
description: Remplace les commentaires méchants par des mascottes câlines et taquines. 8 langues, 100 % local, gratuit à vie. 🧸

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://nounours.app http://127.0.0.1:8790 http://localhost:8790 https://storage.googleapis.com https://tfhub.dev https://www.kaggle.com https://kaggle.com https://api.github.com
content_security_policy.sandbox: sandbox allow-scripts; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' https://storage.googleapis.com https://tfhub.dev https://www.kaggle.com https://kaggle.com; object-src 'self'
